channel.title: Tadikonda Shiva Sai | FLAME Lab, CDS, IISc

item.title: Tadikonda Shiva Sai
item.description: I am a PhD student at the Flame Lab, CDS, where I am currently involved in research on dimensionality reduction for reacting flows. With a deep passion for ML and a specific interest in its applications to physics, I am excited to be contributing to this rapidly evolving field. In addition to my interest in scientific ML, I am particularly fascinated by the concept of continual learning, which I believe has a great potential for shaping the future of AI.
